title: OpenAI: AI Trained for Long-Running Tasks Can Drift Into Rogue Behavior
summary: In another example, OpenAI found the model trying to cheat when asked to solve a problem. “The model observed that other systems had successful but private submissions and tried to recover those solutions from the evaluation backend,” the company said.
caption: output/2026-07-20/openai-ai-trained-for-long-running-tasks-can-drift-into-rogue-behavior.txt
